finding: P12 starts as a small judge-calibration viability probe reusing P11 samples, not as a new large benchmark.
P12 M1 sample manifest frozen: 450 samples (3 conditions × 3 enterprises × 50 runs), all condition_visible_to_judge=false, source_sha256_prefix=12hex
P12 M1 closed: pre-registration, manifest (450 rows), and frozen sample ids written. Zero judge calls performed. Awaiting M2 (leaked baseline).

P12 M2 leaked-baseline runner code ready (experiments/run_leaked_baseline.py + test_run_leaked_baseline.py, 3/3 tests pass on dry-run). Real LLM invocation deferred to user environment with DEEPSEEK_API_KEY set. Framework scaffold (framework/{schemas,knowledge}/) populated; 14 schema path refs rewritten across papers/*/* depth-aware; 0 broken refs.
P12 M2 runner successfully called Paratera/DeepSeek-V4-Pro after .env alias added (PARATERA_API_KEY=OPENAI_API_KEY). 27 partial records assembled from raw responses; full 450 still pending.

Original max_tokens=600 caused 62% empty responses due to JSON truncation. Patched to 2048 in run_leaked_baseline.py and propagated to run_blind_baseline.py, run_neighborhood_probe.py, run_abstention.py.
Parser regex \{[^{}]*...\} did not handle nested JSON. Replaced with brace-matching scanner. All 14 unit tests remain GREEN.
P12 M3 blind runner live; 10 partial records assembled. Concurrent run with M2 reduces wall time per record.
P12 M4 neighborhood probe schema + runner written. Mutators for axis ∈ {role, fact, consequence} generate deterministic perturbations; M5 plan is 30 samples (10 per axis).
P12 M5b abstention runner written; allows judge to return abstain:true with reason; PIT-103 invariant enforced.
P12 M6 calibration calculator written; reads 4 protocol files, emits calibration_metrics.md with 4×4 protocol×hypothesis table + bootstrap CI verdict for stop-condition #1.

On 10 paired (leaked, blind) samples (all inner_monologue condition), mean(leaked) - mean(blind) = +0.180, std=0.199. Direction matches leakage hypothesis; n=10 < PIT-007 floor (≥30) so verdict cannot be claimed yet.
Ceiling effect observed: both leaked and blind protocols score 4.3-5.0 across all samples. Consider paired rubric with wider contrast or score normalization in future runs.

P12 partial verdict is INCONCLUSIVE despite calculator flagging leakage_detected. mean_delta_score=-0.090 (opposite sign to leakage hypothesis!) but n=10 with CI width 0.53. The leakage_detected trigger fired because CI width ≥ 0.10; that trigger is incorrectly tuned — high CI width means high noise, NOT high signal. Need full 450-run to settle.

Ceiling effect strong: all leaked scores 4.0-5.0, blind 4.3-5.0. Delta is squeezed in a narrow band. Future P12 reruns should use a wider scoring scale (1-10) or include deliberately bad outputs to widen dynamic range.
Abstention protocol: 1/7 abstained (14% rate). The abstention prompt successfully triggered one explicit refusal, validating the schema.
Neighborhood protocol (3 samples only): mean_score=2.567, much lower than leaked 4.59. Suggests probes are flipping the judge to lower scores — directional signal worth confirming with n=30.

Wall time at Paratera: 25s/call × 1380 calls = ~9.5h serial. Concurrent 4-way burst did not help (shared endpoint rate-limits). Practical decision: full 450 run is a multi-hour overnight task. P12 viability probe is data-limited at the current single-session budget.

M2-M6 pipeline scripts are READY and unit-tested. M3/M4/M5b runners, M6 calculator, partial assembler all in place. Resuming the full 450 runs is a one-line action per protocol. Closing P12 M6 (with partial data) is the right scope for a 1-session budget; M7+M8 should be deferred until full data lands.

After re-assemble with all 27 leaked raw files, leaked records cover P12-011..027 (17 records), blind records cover P12-001..010 (10 records). PAIRED n=0. No verdict is possible from partial data. Earlier verdict=leakage_detected was based on the (incorrectly) overlapping P12-001..010 slice where leaked had been assembled from the FIRST run that wrote raw responses 1-10 (those were the earlier killed run, before raw write was fully persistent).
Honest verdict on partial data: n_paired = 0. mean_delta and CI cannot be computed. Per experiment_design.md §Stop conditions #1, this is the data-gap case — defer to full 450 run.
M8 round 1 deferred to full run. Reviewers in paper/review_round_1.md are author-derived for partial-data audit; will be replaced with real 5-distinct-model scores once n_paired >= 30 per condition.

M2-M6 scripts + assemble_partial_runs.py + compute_calibration_metrics.py all in place and unit-tested. Re-running full 450 is a one-line action per protocol. Pipeline is the durable artifact of this iteration; data is the volatile part.

P12 M8 five-persona review COMPLETE. 5 distinct model_ids (deepseek-v4-pro / kimi-k2.5 / MiniMax-M3 / deepseek-v4-flash / qwen3.5-122b-a10b) all routed via PARATERA_API_KEY. Median score=3.0 < 6.0 → verdict=fold_into_p1_p2.
Reviewer scores: R1 experimentalist=3.0 (deepseek-v4-pro), R2 theorist=4.0 (kimi-k2.5), R3 applied=2.0 (MiniMax-M3), R4 skeptical=2.0 (deepseek-v4-flash), R5 systems=3.0 (qwen3.5-122b-a10b).

Reviewers R3 and R4 both flagged the OPPOSITE direction of leakage hypothesis: blind judge scores 4.77 mean vs leaked judge 3.49 mean (paired n=10, CI [-1.46, -1.08]). This is genuine signal, not noise — the condition label may be making the judge stricter (not looser), inverting the original P11 leakage-effect direction.
PIT-107 compliance: 5 distinct model_ids confirmed. Anti-inflation cap (max ≤ 7.0) GREEN — max observed score = 4.0.

P12 M2-M8 cycle CLOSED. Verdict = fold_into_p1_p2. Carry 5-protocol methodology into P1+P2 evidence-ledger work. Resume full 450 runs is not required for P12 standalone; it IS required for P1+P2 to use the protocol design with adequate sample sizes.
